---
title: "Austin Barth"
name: "Austin Barth"
image: "/images/profile_pics/austin_barth.jpg"
research: "**Research subject:** Contest assessment strategies and memory in chestnut-backed antbirds (Poliocrania exsul) in Panama"
location: "**Research location:** Panama"
dates: "**Dates:** 2023-present"
category: "Current"
category_order: "4"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
